task: Task #7 — Verificar que las URLs alternates por idioma se emiten correctamente en todas las páginas

hreflangPerPage.evidence: SEO.tsx emits 6 lang alternates + x-default for non-blog routes via SUPPORTED_LANGS + getLocalizedPath, and per-available-lang alternates + x-default for blog posts via getAvailableLangsForSlug. document.documentElement.lang is set on every render.

sitemapBlogVariants.evidence: scripts/seo/seo-sitemap-check.mjs against http://localhost:5000 — "OK — sitemap and hreflang checks passed." Hreflang reciprocity validated, no duplicate <loc>, every URL 2xx.

metaLengths.evidence: scripts/seo-blog-i18n-meta-lengths.test.mjs — "OK — blog-i18n meta lengths within limits (555 entries across 5 langs)". scripts/seo/seo-meta-audit.mjs — "SEO META AUDIT — OK (111 posts × 6 langs, 22 public pages)".

ptLocaleTag.rationale: Content in client/src/data/blog-i18n/pt.ts is European Portuguese ("não residentes", "constituir", "obter"); the language switcher uses the Portugal flag (FLAG_CODES.pt = "pt"). Audience is Portugal-resident, not Brazil.

automatedChecks.name: scripts/seo/seo-sitemap-check.mjs
automatedChecks.purpose: End-to-end sitemap + hreflang reciprocity + HTTP 2xx for every URL

automatedChecks.name: scripts/seo-blog-i18n-meta-lengths.test.mjs
automatedChecks.purpose: Asserts every non-ES blog metaTitle <= 60 and metaDescription <= 160
